name: io.github.kicad-mcp/kicad-mcp
description: Create, review, and export KiCad 9 designs — with a Hartley/Phil's Lab design-review engine.

environmentVariables.name: KICAD_MCP_SEARCH_PATHS
environmentVariables.description: os.pathsep-separated KiCad project roots; also the file-access confinement boundary.

environmentVariables.name: KICAD_MCP_CLI_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Override path to the kicad-cli executable (auto-discovered per platform otherwise).

environmentVariables.name: KICAD_MCP_ALLOW_SCHEMATIC_WRITE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to enable experimental schematic writes.
